description_long: This nightclub features a distinctive U-shaped layout with a central open area, surrounded by angular, modular structures that resemble control consoles or DJ booths. The exterior is predominantly black with white and gray accents, giving it a sleek, modern appearance. Multiple integrated seating areas with swivel chairs are positioned at the consoles, suggesting VIP or DJ zones. The surfaces are smooth and glossy, with illuminated control panels and display screens adding a high-tech ambiance. The structure is compact and segmented, with no visible windows or traditional doors, emphasizing privacy and exclusivity. The overall design is reminiscent of a futuristic or sci-fi themed entertainment venue.
description: A sleek, U-shaped nightclub with modular, high-tech booths and integrated seating, finished in black, white, and gray with glossy surfaces and illuminated panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main U-shaped structure with central open space and prominent control booths facing inward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the booths, the arrangement of seating, and the segmented modular design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back of the U-shape, with clear visibility of the seating and booth arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mirrored modular booths and the open central area.
